creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
- Update to 1.0.4 and unbreak

It still won't support any locale other than "C" because of incomplete
STL/stdc++ locale support in FreeBSD (actually no support at all), but
it's a common problem:

 http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=714164+0+archive/2006/freebsd-questions/20060416.freebsd-questions

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
